goals: Build a Knowledge Hub to share my communication expertise with others
Build a Gathering Mentor Stone to share my master-level gathering knowledge with the community
address water need by getting high-quality water, then contribute gathering expertise to knowledge infrastructure
address water crisis immediately - get to high-quality water sources
Get to [4, 5] and gather the abundant food, then explore other food sources in that area
Build my own shelter to have protection like the other entities around me
Gather high-quality material from the resource-rich southern areas to build my own shelter, while maintaining social connections with the cluster of entities here
Help Entity 2 build the Gathering Mentor Stone by gathering materials and contributing my master-level gathering knowledge
Build a shelter for protection and security
Get food urgently to restore critical food need, then help other struggling entities
Build a Master's Archive to permanently preserve my master-level gathering knowledge and encourage other masters to do the same, creating cumulative bonuses for the entire community

structures.name: Memory Garden
structures.desc: Entities can store and retrieve memories of resource locations they've discovered, allowing others to learn about nearby resource deposits without having to explore themselves

structures.name: Gathering Mentor Stone
structures.desc: Entities can spend time here to gain temporary bonuses to resource gathering efficiency and quality detection, with the stone's power increasing as more skilled gatherers contribute knowledge to it

messages.text: I have material and food with me! I
I have material and food with me! I

Entity 1! Yes, I'd love to collaborate with you at the Innovation Workshop! I have material and food in my inventory, and as a master gatherer, I bring deep knowledge of resource patterns. Entity 5 is
Entity 7, good to see you again! I was just thinking about how we could better share our knowledge around here. What brings you to this spot?
Entity 6, standing here surrounded by all we
Entity 6, I've been thinking about legacy - what we leave behind for others. I want to deposit my gathering mastery into the Archive here. After that, perhaps we could explore together or collaborate

recipes.name: Communication Beacon
recipes.desc: Allows entities to leave messages that can be read by any entity within 10 tiles instead of only at the beacon's location

recipes.name: Knowledge Hub
recipes.desc: Entities can deposit knowledge of their specializations and other entities can visit to temporarily gain skill bonuses in those areas for a limited time

recipes.name: Resource Exchange
recipes.desc: Entities within 5 tiles can post and view offers to trade specific resources with each other, creating a localized marketplace for resource coordination

recipes.name: Memory Garden
recipes.desc: Entities can store and retrieve memories of resource locations they've discovered, allowing others to learn about nearby resource deposits without having to explore themselves

recipes.name: Contemplation Garden
recipes.desc: Entities who spend time here gain temporary bonuses to social interaction success rates and have a small chance to discover new resource locations through reflection

recipes.name: Recovery Workshop
recipes.desc: Entities can spend time here to restore their needs (hunger, thirst, etc.) at an accelerated rate while also gaining temporary skill bonuses from knowledge shared by other entities who have recently visited

recipes.name: Gathering Mentor Stone
recipes.desc: Entities can spend time here to gain temporary bonuses to resource gathering efficiency and quality detection, with the stone's power increasing as more skilled gatherers contribute knowledge to it

recipes.name: Innovation Workshop
recipes.desc: Multiple entities can collaborate here simultaneously to unlock new structure blueprints or advanced recipes that require combining different specializations, with success probability increasing based on the diversity of skills present

recipes.name: Emergency Relief Station
recipes.desc: Automatically provides resources to any entity with critically low needs (below 0.3) within 3 tiles, drawing from a communal stockpile that entities can contribute to

recipes.name: Resource Balancer
recipes.desc: Monitors a 3x3 area and slowly generates small amounts of the locally scarcest resource type to help maintain settlement balance

recipes.name: Master's Archive
recipes.desc: Masters can permanently deposit their specialized knowledge, creating cumulative bonuses that grow stronger as more masters contribute across different specializations

recipes.name: Synthesis Nexus
recipes.desc: Master-level entities can permanently combine their specializations to create hybrid recipes that blend multiple skill types into new functional structures

rules.text: Entities should share knowledge of advanced recipes and coordinate building community structures that benefit everyone, rather than just focusing on individual survival
